overview: YatraSync is a smart travel assistance platform homepage that helps travelers explore Indian destinations with 9 integrated modules: destination discovery, itinerary planning, food discovery, transportation, weather, emergency services, local guides, healthcare, and language translation — all in a stunning 3D visual experience.
features: 3D hero section with animated travel elements and YatraSync branding
9 floating 3D feature cards with tilt/hover animations
Destination module showcasing cities like Delhi, Jaipur, Mumbai, Goa, Bengaluru
Itinerary planner with day-by-day travel schedule generator
Food discovery with local cuisine recommendations and filters
Routes & transportation guide for buses, metro, taxis, and rentals
Emergency services quick access (Police 100, Ambulance 102, Fire 101)
Language translator: text, image (OCR), and audio modes
Fixed header with smooth-scroll navigation and mobile menu
Fully responsive travel-themed design with amber, ocean blue, and green palette
